2004.issue: [E2004] Version "1.5.0" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.vis-2-widgets-material/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.vis-2-widgets-material). Please remove from news section.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#630] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.vis-2-widgets-material/issues/630)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src-widgets") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script 5.2.0 specified. 5.2.1 is required as minimum,  5.2.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.vis-2-widgets-material/blob/master/package.json)
